title: peltaria alliacea
intro: Peltaria alliacea, also known as Sassafras pepper or Root beer plant, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antibacterial agent. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pain, and treating various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Peltaria alliacea is often used in tea, tincture, or decoction forms, and is also used as a spice in some traditional recipes.
